non_blocking_issues: ChatScreen.kt:454-465 — close-left-of-current 理论瞬时误选：pageCount 3→2 时若 settledPage 被 snapshot 重新求值，rootSessionsLatest[1] 可能瞬时指向移位后的会话触发一次 onSelectSession；外同步效应同帧 scrollToPage 纠正，不产生持续振荡；可加 page==currentPage guard 进一步消除（distinctUntilChanged 已大幅降概率）。非阻塞。
notes: Full cross-file state trace of the flicker fix across all close variants (close-current / close-left / close-right / sub-agent-view). rememberUpdatedState atomic within a snapshot frame; the two pager effects (settle pager->session, external-sync session->pager) converge without double-write race; parent capture fresh in both. close-X visibility holds in both modes (visibility independent of fill param). TAB_MAX_WIDTH zero refs, resolver total function. Portrait lock no configChanges interaction. The polish commit 064b2a7 (fill=true + comment) is layout/doc, outside dser's state-logic domain, covered by glmer delta review (9.7). check.sh green.
